DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTS MARIA MOLINA & JOSEPH GASTENAGA'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Re: Defendant Maria Molina -- overruled. Re: Defendant Joseph -- Sustained with leave to amend to plead breach by defendant Joseph and remedy sought if can do so by good faith. Plaintiff has 10 days leave to amend to conform complaint to court's ruling. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
